The '''Darkknell Defense Agency''' was the [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security force]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]]. They were in charge of keeping the peace on that world as well as providing emergency services. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Nyroska]] was a ranking [[Police officer/Legends|officer]] in the agency.

{{Military-stub}}
